zh.lifeSummary: 當John Wylie於大約1497年出生在英國英格蘭賀特福爾利時，他的父親Edward Wylley39歲，母親Agnes Clere34歲。他於大約1511年與Agnes在英國賀特福爾利結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1558年12月12日在他的家鄉享年62歲，埋葬在英國賀特福爾比曉普也斯 斯托特福德。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John Wylie于大约1497年出生在英国英格兰賀特福爾利时，他的父亲Edward Wylley39岁，母亲Agnes Clere34岁。他于大约1511年与Agnes在英国賀特福爾利结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1558年12月12日在他的家乡享年62岁，埋葬在英国賀特福爾比曉普也斯 斯托特福德。

nameMeanings.name: Wylie
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish: from a Scots pet form of the personal name   William  .

variants.name: William
meanings: English (of Norman origin): from the Middle English personal name William, Willam, Willem, an Old Picard and Norman French form of ancient Germanic Willihelm, composed of the elements wil- ‘will, desire’ + helm- ‘helmet, protection’. This Norman personal name became widely used in England, Scotland and Wales after the Conquest, mainly no doubt in honor of the Conqueror himself. By the 13th century it had already become the most popular personal name in England. A Parisian form of the name Guillaume was also sometimes used (see Gillam ), which in medieval Wales was adopted as Gwilym (see Gwilliam ).
Americanized form (translation into English) of French   Guillaume  .

variants.name: Wyllie
meanings: Scottish (Ayrshire and Lanarkshire): variant of   Wylie  .

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

en.lifeSummary: When John Wylie was born about 1497, in Thorley, Hertfordshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Edward Wylley, was 39 and his mother, Agnes Clere, was 34. He married Agnes about 1511, in Thorley, Hertfordshire, England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 2 daughters. He died on 12 December 1558, in his hometown, at the age of 62, and was buried in Bishop's Stortford, Hertfordshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John Wylie est né environ 1497, à Thorley, Hertfordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Edward Wylley, avait 39 ans et sa mère, Agnes Clere, avait 34 ans. Il a épousé Agnes environ 1511, à Thorley, Hertfordshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé le 12 décembre 1558, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 62 ans, et a été enterré à Bishop's Stortford, Hertfordshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als John Wylie um 1497 in Thorley, Hertfordshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Edward Wylley 39 und seine Mutter Agnes Clere 34. Er hat um 1511 in Thorley, Hertfordshire, England Agnes geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb am 12. Dezember 1558 im Alter von 62 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Bishop's Stortford, Hertfordshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John Wylie è nato il circa 1497 nel Thorley, Hertfordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Edward Wylley, aveva 39 anni e il suo madre, Agnes Clere, aveva 34 anni. Lui sposato Agnes circa 1511, nel Thorley, Hertfordshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 2 figlie. Morì il 12 dicembre 1558, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 62 anni, e fu sepolto a Bishop's Stortford, Hertfordshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: John Wylieが約1497年にイギリスイギリスハートフォードシュアイアソルリーで生まれた時，父Edward Wylleyは39歳，母Agnes Clereは34歳であった。約1511年にイギリスハートフォードシュアイアソルリーでAgnesと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1558年12月12日に故郷で62歳で死去し，イギリスハートフォードシュアイアビショプ'ス ストルトフォードにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: John Wylie(이)가 대략 1497년 영국 잉글랜드 허트퍼드실르 토를리에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Edward Wylley(은)는 39세였고, 그의 어머니 Agnes Clere(은)는 34세였다. 그는 대략 1511년 영국 허트퍼드실르 토를리에서 Agnes(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1558년 12월 12일 그의 고향에서 62세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 허트퍼드실르 비숍'스 스토르트퍼드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando John Wylie nasceu aproximadamente 1497, em Thorley, Hertfordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Edward Wylley, tinha 39 anos e sua mãe, Agnes Clere, tinha 34 anos. Ele casou-se com Agnes aproximadamente 1511, em Thorley, Hertfordshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 12 de dezembro de 1558, em sua cidade natal, com 62 anos, e foi sepultado em Bishop's Stortford, Hertfordshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Wylie родился около 1497 г. в местности таурли, хиртфордшир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Edward Wylley было 39 лет, а матери, которую звали Agnes Clere, 34. Он женился на женщине по имени Agnes около 1511 г. в местности таурли, хиртфордшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 2 дочери. Он умер 12 декабря 1558 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 62 лет и был похоронен в местности бишоп'с стортфорд, хиртфордшир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando John Wylie nació aproximadamente 1497, en Thorley, Hertfordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Edward Wylley, tenía 39 años y su mamá, Agnes Clere, tenía 34 años. Se casó con Agnes aproximadamente 1511, en Thorley, Hertfordshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió el 12 de diciembre de 1558, en su pueblo, a la edad de 62 años, y fue sepultado en Bishop's Stortford, Hertfordshire, Inglaterra.
